fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Contextual information about the message exchange between accounts and marketing systems

children.name: source
children.description: Originating system that produced this message

children.name: timestamp
children.description: Date and time when the message was generated

fields.name: segments
fields.description: Array of customer segments with aggregated metrics and product holdings

children.name: segment_id
children.description: Unique identifier for the customer segment

children.name: segment_name
children.description: Human-readable name of the customer segment

children.name: description
children.description: Business definition of the segment, typically based on income or activity criteria

children.name: customer_count
children.description: Total number of customers in this segment

children.name: avg_account_balance
children.description: Average account balance in GBP for customers in this segment

children.name: avg_monthly_transactions
children.description: Average number of transactions per month for customers in this segment

children.name: product_holding
children.description: List of product types typically held by customers in this segment (array of strings)

fields.name: summary
fields.description: Aggregate summary statistics across all customer segments

children.name: total_customers
children.description: Total number of customers across all segments

children.name: total_assets_under_management
children.description: Total assets under management across all customer segments, expressed in GBP with currency symbol

children.name: report_period
children.description: The fiscal or calendar period covered by this report
